prompt: Create a photorealistic street snapshot of a young blonde businesswoman standing in front of Shibuya Station in Tokyo on a busy weekday morning before work. She wears a navy business suit with a fitted blazer and trousers over a crisp white button-up shirt, a small necklace, and carries a black leather handbag on one arm. She holds a takeaway coffee cup in one hand and a silver smartphone in the other, as if checking messages during her commute. Her face is deliberately anonymized by a flat solid tan square censor block covering the entire facial area, while her shoulder-length blonde hair remains visible around it. The background shows the JR Shibuya Station entrance with readable signage including “JR”, “Shibuya Station”, and Japanese station text, plus urban buildings, signboards, railings, pavement, and many commuting pedestrians slightly out of focus. Use natural morning sunlight, realistic shadows, shallow depth of field, documentary photography style, 16:9 horizontal composition, eye-level perspective, crisp detail on the woman and softer busy city background. Keep the scene realistic and candid, with no illustration style, no extra text overlays, and no watermark.
